# PERF-78 negative: query is annotated as index-backed
lang: go
file: PERF-078-safe.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Email string
}

func FindByID(db *gorm.DB, id uint) (User, error) {
	// index-backed
	var u User
	err := db.Raw("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", id).Scan(&u).Error
	return u, err
}
